form.formComment: Has been in a purple patch of form, putting six wins back-to-back. Had plenty of support last start when he won comfortably by 6 lengths at this track (25.62) beating Romford in a Grade 5 on April 2. In sparkling form and can win again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been in a purple patch of form, putting six wins back-to-back. Had plenty of support last start when he won comfortably by 6 lengths at this track (25.62) beating Romford in a Grade 5 on April 2. In sparkling form and can win again.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (19.46) at this track in a Grade 4, finishing fourth and beaten 3.5 lengths. Has two successes and six minors from 13 starts from box 2. Expected to be in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (19.46) at this track in a Grade 4, finishing fourth and beaten 3.5 lengths. Has two successes and six minors from 13 starts from box 2. Expected to be in the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped, was severely checked and raced wide.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fifth last time out over 461m at this track. Prepared to overlook.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fifth last time out over 461m at this track. Prepared to overlook.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow out; Was checked and raced wide.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (19.28) when second at this track in a Other. Has three successes and five minors from nine starts from box 4. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the frame latest (19.28) when second at this track in a Other. Has three successes and five minors from nine starts from box 4. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 1.3 lengths over 340m at this track in a handy (19.39), beating Aariella's Girl. Will find this a bit tougher, doesn't look smart enough to threaten the top few.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by 1.3 lengths over 340m at this track in a handy (19.39), beating Aariella's Girl. Will find this a bit tougher, doesn't look smart enough to threaten the top few.

form.formComment: Strong performance to score by 2.75 lengths in a Grade 3/4 last start at Launceston, clocking a hot 29.53 for the 515m trip. Expected to go close again if runs up to latest time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance to score by 2.75 lengths in a Grade 3/4 last start at Launceston, clocking a hot 29.53 for the 515m trip. Expected to go close again if runs up to latest time.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by one length at this track over 461m (26.19) beating Reindeer Hedghog in Grade 5 on April 3. Prepared to risk on this occasion.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Solid performance to win by one length at this track over 461m (26.19) beating Reindeer Hedghog in Grade 5 on April 3. Prepared to risk on this occasion.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (29.95) when fourth over 515m at Launceston in a Grade 3/4. Goes very well off the draw boasting two wins and two places from five starts. Looks one of the chances.
